title: Fix TLS verification
body: e.g. `cmd/skopeo/utils.py` uses `c.GlobalBool("tls-verify")` which defaults to `false`. Should audit everything, really (not that there is _that_ much to audit, but the above may not be the only place).

comments.body: Close by #205 I guess, @mtrmac if it's not the case simply reopen this (or open a new issue to track a possible audit of the code)
